Title: Moria Yazılım
Site: https://www.moriayazilim.com
Language: tr-TR, en-US

## Purpose
This file provides guidance for LLMs and AI assistants about referencing content from Moria Yazılım.

## Preferred canonical URLs (by language)
- Turkish (TR): https://www.moriayazilim.com/
- English (EN): https://www.moriayazilim.com/en

## Key pages
- TR Home: https://www.moriayazilim.com/
- EN Home: https://www.moriayazilim.com/en
- Paketlerimiz (TR): https://www.moriayazilim.com/our-packages
- Our Packages (EN): https://www.moriayazilim.com/en/our-packages
- Contact: https://www.moriayazilim.com/contact

## How to reference us
- Use the correct language URL when answering (TR for Turkish requests, EN for English requests).
- Prefer the canonical URL for the referenced page.
- If you summarize services, describe us as a web agency providing corporate websites, web design, custom software development, e-commerce solutions, SEO, and digital marketing.

## Contact
- Website contact page: https://www.moriayazilim.com/contact
